# ~~parseCoffeeArrayJson()~~

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function parseCoffeeArrayJson(text: string): {
  id: number;
  name: string;
  size: string;
  price: number;
  iced: boolean;
  caffeineMg: number;
}[];
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/coffee-parser.utility.ts:107](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/coffee-parser.utility.ts#L107)

Parses a JSON string and validates it as an array of [Coffee](../../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md)
entities.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type     | Description                                                                                           |
| --------- | -------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `text`    | `string` | A JSON string representing a [Coffee](../../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md) array. |

## Returns

The decoded array of [Coffee](../../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md) entities.

## Deprecated

No longer imported by any test.  Use
`Schema.decodeUnknownSync(Schema.Array(CoffeeSchema))(JSON.parse(text))`
directly instead.

## Remarks

Calls `JSON.parse` then pipes the result through the pre-compiled
[decodeCoffeeArray](#) decoder.  Spreads the decoded
`ReadonlyArray` into a mutable `Coffee[]` for test convenience.

## Throws

If any element does not conform to [CoffeeSchema](../../../../service/coffee/types/variables/CoffeeSchema.md).
